name: TG THERAPEUTICS  DL -,001
summary: TG Therapeutics, Inc. is a biopharmaceutical company focused on the acquisition, development, and commercialization of novel treatments for B-cell malignancies and autoimmune diseases. The company's pipeline includes investigational therapies targeting hematological malignancies and autoimmune disorders. TG Therapeutics is headquartered in Parsippany, New Jersey.
